testcase.name: lookupPaymentDocuments
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<{ "Payment": [{ "DocumentNumber": "", "BatchId": "", "LocationId": "", "CustomerId": "", "PaymentDate": "", "PaymentTypeDesc": "", }] }> but was:<{"Payment":[{"DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000505","BatchId":"WO101619CRP001","LocationId":"100002","CustomerId":"500002","PaymentDate":"2027-04-12T00:00:00","PaymentTypeDesc":"CreditMemo"}]}> at
